title: Parole Fixer
writer: J. Edgar Hoover, William R. Lipman, Horace McCoy
actors: William Henry, Virginia Dale, Robert Paige
plot: This expose of the U.S. parole system, as seen through the eyes of FBI Director J. Edgar Hoover, takes dead aim on lawyers who manipulate the justice system in order to get undeserving convicts parole from prisons. The point is ma...
